reviews.review: Absolutely stunning saree! The embroidery work is exquisite and the quality is top-notch.
Great comfort and stylish design. The only issue is that they run a bit large.
Love this co-ord set. Perfect fit and the fabric is so comfortable.
The lehenga is beautiful but took longer than expected for delivery.
